overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through an industrial warehouse district, crossing a street at an intersection, and continuing along an elevated bridge walkway. The scene features overcast lighting, concrete industrial architecture, and light urban traffic with palm trees lining the bridge approach.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cracked concrete sidewalk between industrial buildings and the street, passing blue dumpsters

entered.detail: Large beige industrial building with red-trimmed tall windows running along the left side
Blue metal dumpsters lined along the curb next to the road
Wooden utility poles with overhead power lines running parallel to the street
Yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow concrete sidewalk in an industrial district, with a large warehouse building on the left and a multi-lane road on the right. Blue dumpsters and a yellow fire hydrant line the curb, while utility poles recede into the hazy distance.

events.description: character steps off concrete sidewalk onto asphalt road to cross intersection
black sports car drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, moving from the warehouse sidewalk toward the bridge entrance

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: Traffic signal poles at the intersection showing red lights
Stone pillars and decorative railing marking the entrance to the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the industrial sidewalk and crosses the asphalt intersection, passing a black sports car. Traffic lights and stone bridge pillars come into view ahead, while the warehouse recedes behind. The space opens up significantly at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway with highway overlook

events.description: ascending onto the bridge sidewalk with view of highway traffic below
white SUV and red car pass by on the bridge road alongside the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated bridge sidewalk with palm trees on one side and traffic passing on the other, overlooking the highway below

entered.detail: Tall palm trees lining the bridge between the sidewalk and the road
Elevated highway and overpass structure visible below the bridge on the right
Large green directional highway sign mounted on the overpass structure
Distant downtown city buildings visible through the haze at the end of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the elevated bridge sidewalk, with stone railings on the right and traffic passing on the left. Palm trees line the walkway, and below, a busy highway runs parallel. In the distance, the city skyline is visible through the haze as vehicles pass by on the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined industrial corridor into an open, elevated urban vista. It begins along a narrow concrete sidewalk flanked by a large warehouse and a multi-lane road, passing blue dumpsters and a yellow fire hydrant under a hazy sky. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up significantly at an asphalt intersection where the warehouse recedes and the camera passes a black sports car. The movement then shifts toward a stone bridge, transitioning from the street level to an elevated walkway lined with palm trees and stone railings. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a busy highway running below and the distant city skyline shimmering through the haze.
